content:
@Miguel Ojeda it looks like https://rust-for-linux.github.io/docs/kernel/ is docs from the rust branch. Should we change that to be docs from released kernels? Perhaps with an option to select kernel version at top?

Or perhaps we could work with docs.kernel.org to host rustdoc in addition to the restructured text docs?

Andreas Hindborg said:

Or perhaps we could work with docs.kernel.org to host rustdoc in addition to the restructured text docs?

I have been pushing for that since Feb 2021 -- it has been a long story. I have pinged Carlos and Jonathan about it.

At this point, if there is no consensus on what to do with the make targets, I would prefer that we upload the files directly or prepare a script that they run (as I suggested originally); or if that is not OK either, at least I would like to have a (versioned) link in the kernel docs that points into a URL within rust-for-linux.com (with the same version).
